summary:
Forceps are an essential tool during vaginal delivery often utilized to assist in expediting childbirth by applying controlled pressure around the baby’s head. This method helps ensure safe extraction particularly if there are complications preventing normal birth progression without intervention. To summarize further while adhering strictly within two concise statements:

Forceps facilitate quicker assisted births through direct application near the fetal skull; they enhance safety under specific obstetric conditions requiring immediate action beyond spontaneous labor progressions.
